_meta.description: Veterinary database of inherited diseases per dog breed with UK/AKC group classification.
usageHints: Use to show health warnings on breed-specific product pages.
Recommend prescription diets (Hill's k/d, l/d) when breed is predisposed to kidney/liver disease.
Use alternativeNames for fuzzy breed name matching from user input.
